mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement-where your every whim becomes our priority. Join us today and experience true pampering!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting the red carpet treatment as usual. But to my horror, there was a line at the teller. A line! Can you believe it? Me, Hot Josh, having to wait like some peasant? In a fit of entitlement-induced rage, I demanded they open a special VIP line just for me. And you know what? They did it! That's the power of true entitlement, my friends. I may have caused a scene, but in the end, I walked out of there feeling like the king I am.
